facts.statement: Kīlauea has been above sea level for over 500,000 years
facts.actual: Above sea level for approximately 100,000 years (total age 210,000–280,000 years)

facts.statement: Kīlauea erupted continuously for over 20 years (1983–2018)
Kīlauea's east rift zone extends over 200 km
Hawaii Volcanoes National Park attracts fewer than 1 million visitors annually
